title: cyathea filix-femina
intro: Cyathea filix-femina, also known as the Lady fern, is a type of tree fern native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. It is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory conditions, as well as acting as a natural expectorant to relieve coughs and congestion. In herbal preparations, Cyathea filix-femina is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and may be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
